title: Lorry Crane Driver
description:
Job Description:

  • Conduct daily toolbox meetings to accurately delegate roles to individuals of the team and ensure the work is done
  • Managing workflow and manpower deployment to ensure the timely delivery of all assigned landscape projects
  • Work together with the team to craft out project job scopes to meet project requirements
  • Communicate with clients to ensure their expectations are met or receive any feedback
  • Identify key areas of improvement at job sites and develop a plan of action for management
  • General upkeep of Lorry Crane
  • Track all operational admin
  • Delivery, loading and unloading of goods at designated sites
  • To comply with LTA Road Safety and Traffic Regulations
  • Operating of crane while observing all safety aspects and regulations

Job Requirements:

  • Class 4/5 Driving Licence
  • Good communication skills
  • Possesses good problem-solving skills
  • Ability to work independently and remain calm under pressure
  • A good team player
  • Possess computer knowledge
  • Minimum 1 year of experience in the landscape industry
  • Candidates with WSQ Lorry Crane Operator Certifications and experience in driving Lorry Cranes will be prioritised

Job Benefits:

  • Good remuneration package including flexible benefits, and allowances
  • Training and learning opportunities
  • Career progression and development
  • Employee engagement and welfare programmes

Company Overview

Listed as one of NParks Registered Landscape Companies, we handle both residential and commercial corporate properties. Besides regular landscaping and garden maintenance, consult us for customised solutions on your properties.

We know what it takes to provide a thorough and efficient cleaning job. Supported with a huge cleaning fleet and equipment and well-trained staff, we pride ourselves on quality, offering a range of different services that are sure to meet your expectations.

Disposing of waste in an environmentally friendly manner is essential to your business. We can help. Our experts will assess your waste streams and develop the right recycling and disposal solution for you

postedCompany.description: BNL is a leading provider of integrated environmental solutions, covering a range of landscaping, cleaning and waste management services. Having provided comprehensive solutions to the our national parks, commercial buildings, hotels and public projects for the last 50 years. We put our clients first and take immense pride in their success. We are committed to provide unparalleled service that exceeds our partners' expectations and results that help them succeed.
postedCompany.name: BNL SERVICES PTE LTD

districts.location: D16 Upper East Coast, Bedok, Eastwood, Kew Drive
